message:
Improve error handling and usage messages in docs scripts

Enhance generate-docs.mjs with better error messaging that explains
what flag is required, and clearer usage syntax. Simplify
generate-skill.mjs by moving description extraction to generate-docs.mjs,
reducing duplication and improving maintainability. Add comprehensive
documentation comments explaining the enhanced sitemap format and
processing pipeline.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
